Tests that Math.acos returns NaN for Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion that tests the behavior of the `Math.acos` function when it receives `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` as an argument. The `assert` function checks if the result of `Math.acos(Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). This test ensures that the `Math.acos` function correctly handles inputs that are outside its domain, as the arc cosine function is only defined for inputs in the range of -1 to 1. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific edge case for the `Math.acos` function.
